ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., language model, image model) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Long description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the model type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Parent type ID for hierarchical relationships */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the metric belongs to */,
  "current_number_of_words" INTEGER /* Current number of words processed */,
  "max_number_of_words" INTEGER /* Maximum number of words processed */,
  "current_time" INTEGER /* Current time */,
  "time_with_max_words" INTEGER /* Time when maximum words were processed */,
  "convergence_time" INTEGER /* Convergence time */,
  "max_number_of_different_words" INTEGER /* Maximum number of different words encountered */,
  "current_number_of_different_words" INTEGER /* Current number of different words encountered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the data file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the readme file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "email_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user's email has been verified */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device used for access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance_over_time" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time point */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being tracked */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version being tracked */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time point */,
  "current_number_of_words" INTEGER /* Current number of words processed */,
  "max_number_of_words" INTEGER /* Maximum number of words processed */,
  "convergence_time" INTEGER /* Convergence time */,
  "max_number_of_different_words" INTEGER /* Maximum number of different words encountered */,
  "current_number_of_different_words" INTEGER /* Current number of different words encountered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance record was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the performance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_over_time_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_over_time_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comparison" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "model1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first model being compared */,
  "model2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second model being compared */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Performance metric being compared */,
  "model1_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric for the first model */,
  "model2_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric for the second model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comparison was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comparison was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comparison_model1_id FOREIGN KEY ("model1_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comparison_model2_id FOREIGN KEY ("model2_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_version_comparison" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "version1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first model version being compared */,
  "version2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second model version being compared */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Performance metric being compared */,
  "version1_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric for the first model version */,
  "version2_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric for the second model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comparison was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comparison was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_version_comparison_version1_id FOREIGN KEY ("version1_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_version_comparison_version2_id FOREIGN KEY ("version2_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the data belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the data belongs to */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data used to train the model */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., image, text) */,
  "data_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
